name: Potato - Salmon Chowder
recipeIngredient: 4 cups peeled potatoes, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the potatoes and carrots in salted water until just tender.
2. Add the frozen peas and bring to a boil for 1 minute. Remove from heat and do not drain.
3. In a skillet, melt the margarine. Add the onion and cook until lightly browned.
4. Add the flour and stir until smooth. Cook for 1 minute.
5. Gradually add 1/2 of the milk while stirring constantly. Cook over low heat until the sauce boils and thickens.
6. Flake the canned salmon and add to the vegetables.
7. Stir in the hot white sauce, celery, Worcestershire sauce, and remaining milk.
8. Heat thoroughly and serve immediately. Makes 3 quarts.
